assessment.note: She names a felt shift after the reorg while still trying to hold stability for the team, suggesting mild disconnection and transition strain.

new_queue.label: Shift since reorg
new_queue.name: You said 'the shift since the reorg' — what feels most different about it?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific change she is noticing so the manager understands the nature of the disconnect.

new_queue.label: Arrival check-in
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?
new_queue.description: Lets Elena set the frame before any observation or concern is introduced.

new_queue.label: Reorg aftereffects
new_queue.name: What's felt different in your day-to-day since the reorg?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the concrete ways the transition has changed her experience without assuming the cause.

new_queue.label: Transition load
new_queue.name: Where is the reorg adding the most load for you right now?
new_queue.description: Tests whether the issue is temporary transition strain, and where it is showing up operationally.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff reset
new_queue.name: What have you been saying no to since the reorg?
new_queue.description: Surfaces deliberate deprioritisation and whether the tradeoffs are clear or too costly.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What kind of support would actually make this week easier for you?
new_queue.description: Invites a concrete ask so the manager can respond to the real constraint instead of guessing.

new_queue.label: Next focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to tackle first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into a clear next step without opening a new thread.
